past_24_hours.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 驻留在终端中的代理多路复用器。

past_24_hours.description: Become a cracked AI/ML Research Engineer
past_24_hours.description_zh: 成为一名顶尖的AI/ML研究工程师

past_24_hours.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
past_24_hours.description_zh: OfficeCLI是首个也是最好的Office套件，专为AI代理读取、编辑和自动化Word、Excel和PowerPoint文件而构建。免费、开源、单一二进制文件，无需安装Office。

past_24_hours.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 永不停歇的编码。免费AI网关：一个端点，160多个提供商（50多个免费），连接Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Cline和Copilot到免费的Claude/GPT/Gemini。RTK+Caveman堆叠压缩节省15-95%的令牌，智能自动回退，MCP/A2A，多模态API，桌面/PWA。

past_24_hours.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
past_24_hours.description_zh: Orca是用于处理并行代理群的ADE。使用您自己的订阅运行任何编码代理。可在桌面和移动设备上使用。

past_24_hours.description: Run GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) on a 25GB-RAM consumer machine — pure C, zero deps, experts streamed from disk. Tiny engine, immense model. 🐦
past_24_hours.description_zh: 在25GB内存的消费级机器上运行GLM-5.2（744B MoE）——纯C语言，零依赖，专家从磁盘流式传输。微型引擎，庞大模型。🐦

past_week.description: Run GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) on a 25GB-RAM consumer machine — pure C, zero deps, experts streamed from disk. Tiny engine, immense model. 🐦
past_week.description_zh: 在25GB内存的消费级机器上运行GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) —— 纯C语言，零依赖，专家模型从磁盘流式加载。微型引擎，庞大模型。🐦

past_week.description_zh: Orca是用于管理并行代理集群的ADE。使用你自己的订阅运行任何编码代理。支持桌面和移动端。

past_week.description_zh: Wand (WeMod) 应用的高级UX和互操作性扩展

past_week.description_zh: 驻留在终端中的代理多路复用器。

past_week.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
past_week.description_zh: OfficeCLI是首个也是最好的专为AI代理读取、编辑和自动化Word、Excel和PowerPoint文件而设计的Office套件。免费、开源、单一二进制文件，无需安装Office。

past_week.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
past_week.description_zh: 基于Claude Code的AI驱动求职申请框架。Fork它，填写你的个人资料，让Claude评估工作、定制简历、撰写求职信并为你准备面试。

past_month.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.
past_month.description_zh: 让你的AI智能体像房间里最懒的高级开发一样思考。最好的代码是你从未写过的代码。

past_month.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
past_month.description_zh: 全球首个开源、智能体视频制作系统。12条流水线、52个工具、500+智能体技能。将你的AI编码助手变成完整的视频制作工作室。

past_month.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
past_month.description_zh: 在到达LLM之前压缩工具输出、日志、文件和RAG块。减少60-95%的token，答案不变。提供库、代理、MCP服务器。

past_month.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
past_month.description_zh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图谱中——平均仓库毫秒级完成。支持158种语言，亚毫秒查询，减少99%的token。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖。

past_month.description: macOS video editor built for AI

LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。  LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
past_month.description_zh: 开源AI渗透测试工具，用于发现和修复应用漏洞。

past_month.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
past_month.description_zh: 一种格式规范，用于向编码智能体描述视觉标识。DESIGN.md为智能体提供对设计系统的持久、结构化理解。

past_month.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
past_month.description_zh: 无限OCR工作：欢迎一次性长视野解析时代。

past_month.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
past_month.description_zh: 开源AI语音工作室。克隆、听写、创作。

past_year.description_zh: 您专属的个人AI助手。任何操作系统。任何平台。龙虾风格。🦞

past_year.description_zh: 与您一同成长的智能体

past_year.description: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
past_year.description_zh: 一个由智能体管理的博物馆展品，使用Rust语言结合Gajae-Code / LazyCodex构建——全程无需人工干预开发与维护。

past_year.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
past_year.description_zh: 触手可及的完整AI代理机构——从前端专家到Reddit社区忍者，从趣味注入者到现实检验者。每个智能体都是拥有个性、流程和可交付成果的领域专家。

past_year.description_zh: 使用Garry Tan的精确Claude Code配置：23个定制化工具，分别担任CEO、设计师、工程经理、发布经理、文档工程师和QA。
